# Pull Request

## Best Version Inputs

- [ ] I provided Best Version metrics for this change (workflow_dispatch inputs or PR labels).
- [ ] I validated metrics against a trustworthy source (not demo/fallback).

Suggested values to include:
- field_impact: <0-100>
- model_quality: <0-100>
- reliability: <0-100>
- safety: <0-100>
- delivery_speed: <0-100>
- pesticide_reduction_percent_min: <number>
- yield_delta_percent_min: <number>
- uptime_percent_min: <number>
- api_p95_latency_ms_max: <number>
- harmful_false_recommendation_rate_max: <number>
- change_failure_rate_max: <number>
- rollback_time_minutes_max: <number>
